🤖AI Insight

Gold is the best inflation hedge for middle class Indian investors, delivering 12–14% CAGR in INR terms. Target: ₹1,00,000/10g by 2030. Recommend 10–15% portfolio in Gold ETFs or Sovereign Gold Bonds (tax-efficient). Silver has higher upside (+industrial demand) but more volatility.

🙏 Namaste! Welcome to BharatDesk AI 🇮🇳

I am your personal investment advisor — like a trusted financial friend who gives advice based on your real income and situation.

To get started, tell me:
👤 What is your job or profession?
💰 What is your monthly income?
📊 Have you invested before?

I will give you a 100% personalised plan — exactly how much to invest, where to invest, and how to grow your money step by step! 🚀

📈 Also ask about any NSE/BSE stock · SIP · FD rates · Gold prices · Tax saving

🏢 Our Story · Jharkhand, India
About BharatDesk

Three passionate young founders from Jharkhand asked: why does good financial research cost thousands? BharatDesk was born to democratise institutional-grade investment data for India's 300 million middle class households — completely free.

🎯 Our Mission

Democratise institutional-grade financial research. Make every rupee of middle class investment work harder with data-driven decisions and AI-powered insights.
